name: adguard-home-mcp

highlights.text: Filtering — blocklists, custom rules, safe browsing, parental, safe search
Query log — search, inspect, and clear DNS query history
Clients — per-device policies, persistent config, runtime discovery
DNS — upstream servers, rate limiting, cache, access lists, rewrites
TLS & DHCP — certificate management, DHCP leases and static mappings
Access tiers — read-only mode (29 tools) or full access (65 tools)

readme:
### What it does

AdGuard Home MCP gives your AI agent full operational control over a self-hosted AdGuard Home instance — the network-wide DNS filter that blocks ads, trackers, malware, and adult content for every device on your network.

65 tools across 16 categories cover the entire AdGuard Home API: global protection status, DNS configuration, query log analysis, filtering rules, blocklist management, safe browsing, parental controls, safe search, per-client policies, DHCP, DNS rewrites, TLS certificates, blocked services, and access control.

### Access tiers

Two access modes keep your instance safe:

- **Read-only** (29 tools) — query status, inspect config, search logs. No mutations.
- **Full access** (65 tools) — everything including rule changes, client config, DHCP, TLS.

Set `ADGUARD_ACCESS_TIER=read-only` for monitoring-only agents. Default is `full`.

### Fine-grained tool control

Beyond tiers, you can scope exactly which tools are exposed:

- `ADGUARD_CATEGORIES` — only load specific categories (e.g. `filtering,querylog`)
- `ADGUARD_TOOL_WHITELIST` / `ADGUARD_TOOL_BLACKLIST` — per-tool allow/deny

This keeps the tool list tight for focused agents and reduces context window usage.

### Credential safety

All error messages pass through `sanitizeMessage()` which strips usernames, passwords, and base64-encoded auth headers before they reach the LLM context. Your AdGuard Home credentials never leak into conversation history.

### Domain coverage

| Category | Tools | What you can do |
|----------|-------|-----------------|
| Global | 3 | Protection status, DNS status, version info |
| DNS | 7 | Upstream config, rate limits, cache, access lists |
| Filtering | 7 | Blocklists, custom rules, enable/disable, check host |
| Query Log | 4 | Search, inspect, configure, clear |
| Stats | 4 | Query stats, top clients, reset, configure |
| Clients | 6 | Persistent config, runtime discovery, per-client policy |
| Rewrites | 3 | DNS rewrites for local resolution |
| Blocked Services | 4 | Service-level blocking (social media, gaming, etc.) |
| Safe Browsing | 2 | Google Safe Browsing integration |
| Parental | 2 | Parental control filter |
| Safe Search | 3 | Per-service safe search enforcement |
| DHCP | 6 | Server config, leases, static mappings |
| TLS | 3 | Certificate status, configuration, validation |
| Access | 3 | Allowed/blocked client and domain lists |
| Install | 2 | Initial setup configuration |
| Mobile | 1 | Mobile client configuration profile |

env.name: ADGUARD_ACCESS_TIER
env.description: Access level: full (65 tools) or read-only (29 tools)

env.name: ADGUARD_CATEGORIES
env.description: Comma-separated list of tool categories to expose (omit for all)

setup.blurb: Network-wide DNS filtering — ads, trackers, malware, and parental controls for every device.
setup.help_text: Provide the URL and admin credentials for your AdGuard Home instance. Use read-only tier for monitoring agents.

fields.label: AdGuard Home URL
fields.help: Base URL of your AdGuard Home instance (including port)

scenarios.label: Audit blocking effectiveness
scenarios.body: Pull query stats and top blocked domains, review active blocklists, check for any client-specific overrides that might weaken protection, and summarise filtering coverage.

scenarios.label: Set up kid-safe browsing
scenarios.body: Enable parental controls and safe search, create a client policy for the child's devices, block social media and gaming services, and verify the rules are active in the query log.

scenarios.label: Investigate slow DNS resolution
scenarios.body: Check upstream DNS servers and their response times, review cache hit rates, inspect rate limiting config, and search query log for patterns of slow or failed lookups.

details.note: Full dns-v1 conformance via 65-tool AdGuard Home API coverage. Access tier and category filtering provide granular control.
